bead.title: test: automated no-fabricated-failure drain regression via ScriptHarness + fake fizeau (Layer B)
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The fail-open contract's central claim — "no fabricated-failure signature survives a clean drain" — is currently provable only by a manual live drain, not a CI gate. There is no automated regression asserting the absence of the fabricated-failure signatures.

PROPOSED FIX (Layer B of the FEAT-004 test plan)
Add a ScriptHarness-driven drain regression test (the existing deterministic fixture, no live binary) plus a fake fizeau service that can replay: a normal route-decision; quota-unknown; a slow-but-successful route preflight; a >budget long tool call; an infra pre-merge timeout (ctx-cancel); a reviewer-unavailable route failure AND a reviewer-disagreement; and a multi-worker cleanup. Use the existing ScriptHarness + integration helpers (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_integration_test.go, integration_helper_test.go) as the seam.
ASSERTION: across a clean drain of the fixture beads, NONE of these fabricated-failure signatures appear in the worker output/events — "no viable routing candidate", progress_watchdog + empty provider=, consecutive_wedge, "production-reachability ... context canceled" — and the beads reach merged (not parked). Real safety gates (land-side preserve, a check that returned block, a true AC contradiction) are exempt.

NON-SCOPE: the TUI-drift version-pin fixture matrix (Layer C) is a separate bead; this is the orchestration-level no-fabrication regression only.

ACCEPTANCE
1. New TestDrain_NoFabricatedFailureSignatures (or similar) drives a ScriptHarness/fake-fizeau drain replaying the scenarios above and asserts the four signatures are absent and beads merge.
2. The test is deterministic and runs in the default suite (no //go:build live_harness, no credentials).
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

events.body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"system_unready: The bead is well-scoped: it names a concrete test function, references specific existing integration-test files as the seam, enumerates four exact fabricated-failure signature strings to assert absent, and gates on the standard cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test path. The main gap is that 'fake fizeau' is described by its replay scenarios rather than by protocol or interface — an agent must explore the fizeau client code to derive the mock surface. The seven scenarios are enumerated but their wire-level behaviors (quota-unknown response shape, slow-preflight timing, budget-exceeded indication) are implicit in fizeau internals. These are resolvable by codebase exploration, not operator clarification, so the bead is dispatchable as written.","fingerprint":"dd7159bd5b57bb34f4f1505f270e3a60b0aa4f90c365093786c7e52f934ec094","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"system_unready","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.system_unready","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"dd7159bd5b57bb34f4f1505f270e3a60b0aa4f90c365093786c7e52f934ec094"}
